tools.name: explore
tools.title: Explore Infobip Documentation
tools.description:
# Explore Infobip Documentation

Use semantic search to explore the [Infobip documentation hub](https://www.infobip.com/docs), a comprehensive collection of product documentation, practical use cases, and general platform information designed to help both new and advanced users find resources and inspiration for interacting with end-users.

query.description: Text query to search through Infobip documentation pages.

fuzziness.description: Disable fuzzy matching for more precise search results. When set to true only exact matches will be returned.
